form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last start ran on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 on March 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Shaime carrying 54.5kg at $5. At only start last preparation sat on the pace when 2nd of 14 at Ballarat Bm62 on September 19 over 1200m, head behind Runaway Soul with 58.5kg at $2.50. Fitter and can figure prominently.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 100m, laying in.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months favourite; won by 2 len at Ballarat Mdn-Sw March 20 over 1200m defeating Blue Light Disco with 57kg at $2.05. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Ballarat 3yo F Mdn-Sw on September 19 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Gisella carrying 57kg at $3.20. Can go right on with it now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the lead.
Raced greenly under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd in a small field at this track Bm62 on March 27 over 1300m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Lady Sadler carrying 59.5kg at $2.60. Before that 5th of 7 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo F Bm64 on March 11 over 1400m, 3 len behind Paltrow Miss carrying 59kg at $10. Thereabouts last time out. Should run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Knuckled on jumping away. Raced keenly in the early stages.
Bounded as the start was effected and lost ground.
Slow to begin.
Raced four wide without cover throughout.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Mornington Bm70 December 17 over 1500m, 4 len behind Welcometotheshow with 52.5kg at $4.80. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at Kilmore 3yo F Mdn-Sw October 13 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Grinzinger Champ with 57kg at $7.50. Classy filly who looks very well placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1200m, eased to avoid the heels of Falstaffian.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Sale F&M Bm62 on March 1 over 1112m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Juice Box carrying 59.5kg at $2.60. Last start second last of 7 at this track F&M Bm62 on March 20 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Nerola with 59.5kg at $4.20. Not discounting.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months ran last of 7 at Pakenham Bm62 on March 19 over 1400m, on a slow track; 10 len behind Shidan carrying 57.5kg at $51. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Morphettville Parks Cl2 on September 20 over 1250m, 11 len behind Zunna carrying 56.5kg at $21. Fitter but others are better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and contacted soon after by Sapphires Son.
Slow to begin.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Kilmore Bm56 September 29 over 1210m, 4 len behind Greenhill Prince with 57.5kg at $10. First up last campaign fourth of 9 at Seymour Bm64 July 20 over 1000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Per Sempre carrying 56kg at $19. Prefer to see how she returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 50m bumped by Jackie's Maid.

Near the 700m, when laying in, shifted in.
